stem: The positive number a is 1,932% of the sum of the positive numbers b and c, and b is 75% of c. What percent of b is a?
rationale:
Choice A is correct. Since b = 0.75c, c = b/0.75 = (4/3)b, so b + c = b + (4/3)b = (7/3)b. Then a = 19.32(b+c) = 19.32 · (7/3)b = 45.08b. As a percent, a is 4,508% of b.

Choice B results from using b+c = (4/3)b. Choice C misreads percent as a decimal. Choice D reports the multiplier as a percent (45.08 instead of 4,508).
